misc.title: May 5th is known as Children’s Day in Japan. It’s a national holiday dedicated to celebrating the healthy growth of children! ✨ Fun fact: in the world of manga, this day is also famous for having an i
misc.text: May 5th is known as Children’s Day in Japan. It’s a national holiday dedicated to celebrating the healthy growth of children! ✨ Fun fact: in the world of manga, this day is also famous for having an incredibly high number of characters celebrating their birthdays! 🎂 Do you know of any characters whose birthday falls on this day? List any characters that come to mind in the comments! 👇 #ChildrensDay #mangaplus
